'''''Annihilator''''' was the mobile command base of [[Atha Prime/Legends|Atha Prime]]. It resembled two [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] joined together and was used to launch his [[Clone Warrior]]s. Prime's personal [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], ''[[Skyriver Invader|Apex Invader]]'', was able to attach atop the ''Annihilator'' which presumably gave him the ultimate command vantage point for battles.<ref name="Epic" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Annihilator'' was a concept for a vehicle that would have been part of a proposed but ultimately rejected extension of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' toy line, ''[[The Epic Continues]]''.<ref name="Tales" />
